title: Enabling Accessibility Fund – small projects - funding program  - Canada.ca
content:
## Enabling Accessibility Fund - Small Projects Component
This funding opportunity aims to make communities and workplaces across Canada more accessible for persons with disabilities. It will fund projects that create more opportunities for persons with disabilities to take part in community activities, programs and services, and access employment.

## Information sessions
The Department will hold virtual information sessions to provide an overview of this application process for organizations interested in applying for funding.
The dates for the sessions are as follows:
- June 18, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – English
- June 20, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – French
- June 26, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – English
- June 27, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – French
- July 9, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – English
- July 10, 2024, at 1:00 PM Eastern Daylight Time – French
If you would like to attend an information session, send an email to NC-HIP-PIP-EAF_ODI-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca . In your email, specify the date and your preferred language (English or French). If you require accommodations to participate, please let us know 10 business days prior to the information session.

## Help and contact information
- How to use the EAF small projects calculator?
- Enquiries will be answered between May 28, 2024 to July 19, 2024, at 3:00 pm EDT.
- Email: NC-HIP-PIP-EAF_ODI-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
- Contact us here for technical help related to the EAF small projects calculator.
- Email: NC-HIP-PIP-EAF_ODI-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
- Contact us here for technical help related to the Grants and Contribution Online Services (GCOS).
- Email: NA-GCOS-SELSC-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
- If you have questions or need an accommodation, please email us before July 19, 2024, at 3:00 pm EDT.
- Email: NC-HIP-PIP-EAF_ODI-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
